taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Data Analysis, Data Scientist
core_skills: Machine Learning, Data Pipelines, Python, Java, NumPy
skill_match_scores: Machine Learning:1.0, Data Pipelines:0.5, Python:1.0, Java:1.0, NumPy:1.0
must_have_quals: Bachelor's degree or foreign equivalent in Data Science, Physics, or related quantitative field, Three (3) years of experience in the job offered or related occupation, Experience with common tools for building and deploying machine learning model and applications: Python, Java, NumPy, Pandas, Scala/Spark, XGBoost, sklearn, TensorFlow, MLflow, Writing production-quality code, incorporating testing, evaluation, and monitoring, ETL with AWS Glue and AWS Cloud Watch monitoring, Docker deployments
core_responsibilities: Build machine learning algorithms and data pipelines, deploy models to production, and test models online and offline in A/B test environments, Conduct thorough testing of models in live environments using A/B testing methodologies to validate performance and iterate on improvements, Collaborate with data scientists, growth engineers, data engineering, product managers, and other teams to ensure algorithms can be launched successfully, Deploy machine learning models into production ensuring reliability, scalability, and maintainability, Create and utilize systems to monitor and analyze the performance of deployed models, identifying opportunities for optimization and enhancement, Drive new initiatives to help the growth marketing team use machine learning to optimize different applications including email campaigns, push notifications, user acquisition strategies, and personalized recommendations
job_summary: Tubi is a free streaming service that entertains over 100 million monthly active users. They are seeking a Data Scientist to build machine learning algorithms and data pipelines, deploy models to production, and conduct thorough testing of models to validate performance and implement improvements.
